title: Cerf-volant du bout du monde
writer: Roger Pigaut, Antoine Tudal, Kia-Yi Wang
actors: Patrick de Bardine, Sylviane Rozenberg, Jacques Faburel
plot: This interesting little French film is set in a run-down suburb of Paris. It's about a group of bored children making mischief to fill the days (eg sticking a cat up a tree and then calling the fire brigade so they can watch them ...
